task: v9 development consolidation and event-driven sync integration
changes: Added explicit SYNC_READY and SYNC_LOST events to the state machine
Rewired sync transitions to be event-driven and deterministic
Expanded guidance panel with mode-specific rationale and post-trip hints
Normalized closed-state voltage and frequency display
validated_behaviors: Sim start, grid warm-up, generator start/stop sequence
Safe sync gating based on ΔV/Δf/Δφ thresholds
Timing studio and live telemetry overlay
Scenario selection, guidance and debrief panels
remaining_risks: Potential race conditions if SYNC_READY/SYNC_LOST events fire too frequently
Incomplete scenario runner scaffolding and trip summary features
Minor UI inconsistencies during breaker closing phase
Phase/slip display during parallel operation requires verification
next_steps: Implement dwell time gating for sync events
Refine scenario guidance to override generic guidance when active
Develop scenario runner logic with quickstart and failure scenarios
Add trip summary and chart markers
Perform thorough mobile/desktop validation and UI polish
